policy_note: Default policy is 90% line coverage per source file. After the larql-compute-metal extraction (ADR-019), this crate is CPU-side only — the trait, the CpuBackend impl, pipeline types, and env-option helpers. Every file is expected to clear the 90% floor without `exclude_globs` hacks. GPU-shader coverage lives in `crates/larql-compute-metal/coverage-policy.json`. 2026-06-06: two inherited debt baselines added to unblock CI — `attention/decode.rs` (55%) is dominated by the opt-in `run_attention_block_decode_step_q4k_direct` path (LARQL_Q4K_DIRECT_ATTN, roadmap #16) which default tests don't exercise; `kv_dispatch/cpu.rs` (88%) is the engine-unification dispatch surface. FOLLOW-UP: restore both to >=90 (decode.rs needs a Q4_K-attention fixture that runs the q4k-direct path; do not treat these floors as permanent).
